pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.5.7 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE 9+ namespace support required by modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the runtime JDK.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the Java EE javax package to the Jakarta EE jakarta package to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
